channel.title: password on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in password on IT notes

item.title: ssh only password
item.description: When using ssh if you only need to use password (no keys): ssh -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no <host>

item.title: urandom
item.description: /dev/urandom To generate a random string/password of 32 chars using /dev/urandom: $ base64 /dev/urandom | head -c 32
